name: 劉慧雯
objective:
本課程提供學生及職前專業人士必備之英語文語言技巧，強調設計與人文專業領域之英文溝通能力之訓練。課程內容依學院專業內容區分並整合英語文之聽說讀寫之能力為未來全球化移動及以英語專業溝通人才培育為目標。
This course aims to provide pre-service design and cultural business students/professionals with the adequate skills of the English language and communicative competence to facilitate their current academic and future career pursuits. Students are encouraged to utilize their domain expertise to participate in professional communication in English. Centered on the training of professional use of the English language, the ESP curriculum as the crux of a highly-integrated work of domain knowledge and the English learning development embodies the indispensable credentials required for a global profession.
schedule:
Week 1: Course Overview & Pretest
Week 2: Unit 1 Big Data
Week 3: Unit 1 Big Data
Week 4: Unit 2 Artificial Intelligence
Week 5: Unit 2 Artificial Intelligence
Week 6: Unit 3 Robotics
Week 7: Unit 3 Robotics
Week 8: Review
Week 9: Midterm Exam
Week 10: Unit 4 Hackers & Internet Security
Week 11: Unit 4 Hackers & Internet Security
Week 12: Unit 5 Problem Solving
Week 13: Unit 5 Problem Solving
Week 14: Unit 6 DNA Testing & Family History
Week 15: Unit 6 DNA Testing & Family History
Week 16: Review
Week 17: Presentations
Week 18: Final Exam
課程是否導入AI: ● 使用生成式 AI 作為教學過程的輔助工具（Use generative AI tools as an aid to the teaching process）● 鼓勵學生使用生成式 AI 工具（Encourage students to use generative AI tools）● 使用生成式 AI 進行課堂即時互動（Use generative AI for real-time classroom interaction）● 簡單介紹 AI 的基本概念（Briefly introduce the basic concept of AI）
remarks: 本課程為專班課程，無法加選。
